name: Mollie's Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger meat and drain.
2. Add the minced garlic, whole basil, tomato can, tomato paste cans, and mushrooms to the pan. Stir well.
3. Cover and simmer for 14-20 minutes, stirring often.
4. Cook the noodles in salted water until al dente.
5. Add Italian seasoning, oregano, and onion to taste before serving.
